title: SMaRT Coalition Crosses 350 Members
summary: On the fourth anniversary of its founding, SMaRT4Bharat announced 350+ member portals reaching over 400 million Bharatiya readers.
author: SMaRT Editorial

title: Research Grant Cycle 2025 Now Open
summary: Applications open for the 2025 research grant cycle, supporting long-form investigative journalism across all ten coalition languages.
author: Research Council

title: Annual Coalition Summit in Varanasi
summary: Member portals will gather in Varanasi for the annual coalition summit, focusing on translation pipelines and shared distribution.
author: Events
